c74object.name: tap.fft.normalize~
c74object.digest: Normalize the results of an FFT
c74object.description: Normalize the results of an FFT. See this article for more information.

objarg.name: framesize
objarg.digest: The number of bins in each FFT frame
objarg.description: The number of bins in each FFT frame.

attribute.name: framesize
attribute.digest: Number of bins in the FFT
attribute.description: Number of bins in the FFT.
